details.unit_summary: 193/193 tests passing across 19 test files. Includes: tools.test.ts (11 tests), tools-extended.test.ts (15 tests), config.test.ts (26 tests), cliente.test.ts (26 tests), chunking.test.ts (14 tests), plus all pre-existing tests.
details.typecheck_summary: Only 3 pre-existing errors in src/main/tipc.ts lines 182-185 (RevisaoIA type mismatch). Zero new TS errors introduced by this work.
details.lint_summary: 189 errors: 118 explicit-function-return-type, 57 no-explicit-any, 8 no-unused-vars, 3 react-refresh. All are pre-existing patterns in the codebase — no new code-specific lint issues in IA/knowledge files.

security.eval_usage: None found in src/main/ia/ or src/main/knowledge/
security.hardcoded_secrets: None. API keys resolved from DB (configuracao_ia table) or .env.local (loadEnvLocal in index.ts, gitignored)
security.input_validation: All tools use Zod schemas for input validation. SQL queries use parameterized $1/$2 style consistently.
security.auth_checks: N/A — desktop Electron app, single user

patterns.array_params: PASS. All queryAll/queryOne/execute/insertReturningId calls in knowledge/, ia/ use array params [p1, p2]. Zero spread params found.
patterns.three_status_pattern: PASS. All 26 tools use toolResult() helper consistently. Each tool returns {status: 'ok'|'vazio'|'erro', summary, data, _meta}.
patterns.graceful_degradation: PASS. All knowledge modules (embeddings, search, ingest, graph) wrap operations in try/catch and return null/empty on failure. session-processor.ts same pattern. discovery.ts wraps all sub-functions in try/catch returning null.
patterns.naming_conventions: PASS. Portuguese naming consistent with codebase: papel, conteudo, criada_em, atualizada_em. New tables follow existing pattern (ia_conversas, ia_mensagens, ia_memorias, knowledge_sources, etc.).
patterns.file_organization: PASS. New files follow existing structure: src/main/ia/ for IA logic, src/main/knowledge/ for knowledge layer, src/main/db/ for schema/queries, src/shared/types.ts for shared types, tests/ mirroring src/ structure.
patterns.domain_adaptation: PASS. Zero EscalaFlow domain references found (searched for: escala, colaborador, setor, CLT, RH, turnos, demanda, alocac, escalaflow). All prompts reference 'jornal de ofertas de supermercado'.

quality.console_debugging: PASS. All console.log statements in new code use structured prefixes ([AI SDK:...], [embeddings], [graph], [seed-knowledge], [session-processor]) — operational logging, not debugging residuals.
quality.commented_out_code: PASS. No commented-out code found in new files.
quality.error_handling: PASS. All async operations in tools, knowledge layer, session-processor use try/catch with error propagation or graceful degradation. Tools return toolResult('erro', ...) on failure. Knowledge modules return null/empty arrays.
quality.edge_cases: PASS. Handles: empty search results (vazio status), missing DB tables (graceful skip), missing embedding model (fallback to keyword search), missing knowledge graph (empty relations), tool calls with no final text (follow-up pattern), history compaction threshold checks, dedup by cosine similarity.

insertReturningId() helper (query.ts)

Streaming via streamText + BrowserWindow broadcast (cliente.ts)

Tool result truncation with TOOL_RESULT_MAX_CHARS=1500 (cliente.ts)

buscar_conhecimento tool registered in iaTools

Dedup by cosine similarity > 0.85 (session-processor.ts)

Fire-and-forget extractMemories call in ia.stream handler (tipc.ts)

Graph enrichment in search results (search.ts getRelatedEntities)

graphStats for quick overview (graph.ts)

explorar_relacoes tool registered in iaTools

suggestions.description: The deprecated chat() legacy export and backward-compat code (lines 792-814) could be removed once all consumers are migrated to iaEnviarMensagem(). Consider adding a TODO to track this cleanup.

The deprecated legacy functions (setApiKey, getApiKey, getProvider, getModel at lines 136-161) are still exported for backward compat. tipc.ts still uses them at ia.set_api_key and ia.get_api_key handlers. These can be cleaned up once the frontend settings page is fully migrated to ia.config.save/get.
IaStoreMessage has deprecated 'role' and 'content' fields for backward compat (lines 10-14). The comment says subtask-1-10 should remove these. Consider a follow-up cleanup task.

The model path resolution (resolveModelPath) falls back to process.cwd() + '/models/embeddings' in dev. The model files (~150-440MB) need to be downloaded separately. Consider adding a first-run check or documentation note.
rebuildGraph processes chunks sequentially (1 LLM call per chunk, max 100 chunks). For large knowledge bases, this could be slow. Consider batch processing or parallelism in a future iteration.
